title: juncus marginatus var. vulgaris
intro: Juncus marginatus var. vulgaris, also known as the common rush, is a type of plant that belongs to the Juncaceae family and is commonly found in wetlands and marshy areas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. The health benefits of Juncus marginatus var. vulgaris include its potential to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
